scope: Visible mobile live Book ladder staged price and Buy/Sell ticket handoff

assertions.baseline: Book opens on Mexico winner with staged-level-none and visible ask/bid ladder rows.
assertions.askStage: Tapping order-book-ask-level-mexico-1 stages Buy ask at 0.68 USDT / 68c for 900 shares.
assertions.askTicket: Staged open-ticket launches a Buy ticket; after tapping +$10 it shows ticket-price-line 68c, To win, and Swipe up to buy.
assertions.bidStage: Tapping order-book-bid-level-mexico-1 stages Sell bid at 0.61 USDT / 61c for 1.28k shares.
assertions.bidTicket: Staged open-ticket launches a Sell ticket; after tapping +$10 it shows ticket-price-line 61c and Swipe up to sell.
assertions.contractShape: The proof uses deterministic backend-shaped Book depth already exposed to the mobile UI; no backend route or provider service was edited.

remainingGaps: The staged ladder handoff is local mobile UI behavior; server order submission still consumes the existing ticket/order service contract.
Real provider-backed live depth breadth remains dependent on backend/provider coverage outside this Agent B UI-owned change.
